mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name, t2.name typeName FROM castle_help_article t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_help_article_type t2 ON t.type_id = t2.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleEntity.id},'%')
AND t.title like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleEntity.title},'%')
AND t.content like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleEntity.content},'%')
AND t.remark like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleEntity.remark},'%')
AND t.type_id = #{castleHelpArticleEntity.typeId}
AND t.status like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleEntity.isDeleted},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM castle_help_article t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleEntity.id},'%')
AND t.title like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleEntity.title},'%')
AND t.content like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleEntity.content},'%')
AND t.remark like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleEntity.remark},'%')
AND t.type_id = #{castleHelpArticleEntity.typeId}
AND t.status like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleEntity.isDeleted},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_help_article t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
